description.unified: Dispels harmful effects from the ally with the lowest current HP and restores HP 1159*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+188.1% ATK 3 times. When healing the target, nearby allies are additionally healed for 40% of the healing amount.

Grants a shield to 4 ally with the highest damage dealt, absorbing [2080->795]*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+[800.6%->129%] ATK damage for [4 sec->16 sec]. While the shield is active, Healing Rate increases by [120%->11%] and CC Resistance increases by [800->100].

For 15 sec, heals 2 allies with the lowest current HP for [14% of Max HP (once)->1.5% of Max HP 10 times], and increases Magic DEF by [60*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))->157+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)].
[Heaven's Vengeance] changes the attack target to a random target and increases Blind duration by {0} sec.
Every 8sec, heals 4 allies with the lowest current HP for {0}% of ATK, and increases the Critical Rate by [200->160] and Critical DMG by {1}% of 4 allies with the highest ATK for 8 sec.
